title: E45 Moisturising Lotion 200 ml, Daily Body Moisturiser for Dry & Sensitive Skin, Long-Lasting Hydration to Soothe, Protect & Restore Softness

features: LONG-LASTING DRY SKIN CARE – E45 Lotion is a light, unperfumed lotion that can be used all over the body, including the face, to provide long-lasting care for dry and sensitive skin. It is a light daily moisturiser for dry skin that keeps your skin feeling soft and deeply hydrated. E45 lotion has been formulated to give deep moisturisation that lasts throughout the day.

DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED – This lotion has been formulated by skin care experts at E45 and is perfume-free and dermatologically tested and is a suitable moisturiser for even sensitive skin. E45 Lotion is clinically proven to help protect the skin from dryness, soothe roughness, reduce redness, and reduce scaling and flaking. In just 2 weeks, the lotion can help to visibly reduce redness and improve the appearance of extremely dry and irritable skin when applied daily.

MOISTURISING INGREDIENTS – E45 Lotion contains Medilan, which is a purified, hypoallergenic form of lanolin with excellent moisturising properties. It soothes, protects, and cares for your skin. This light lotion is quickly and easily absorbed to keep your skin feeling soft, supple, and hydrated. E45 Lotion's gentle formulation can be used daily on very dry and sensitive skin and is suitable for the whole family, including babies over 3 months.

QUALITY SKINCARE EVERY DAY – For 60 years, E45 has been a skincare expert in dry and itchy skin and treatment for eczema, psoriasis, ichthyosis and other dry skin conditions. We understand the importance of quality everyday products that care for your skin with minimal fuss. The E45 range of products has been developed for different skin types and parts of the body and works hard to protect and maintain skin health. It has proven dermatological expertise dedicated to vulnerable dry skin.

HISTORY OF E45 – We released our E45 Cream in 1952 after a customer request for a product that would soothe and protect the skin. In 1963 physicians noticed the benefits of E45 cream for dry skin conditions and our cream was introduced to pharmacy and retail in 1980. We’ve continued to create products with patients and their skin in mind. We strive to continue to serve the needs of patients and healthcare professionals and produce better treatment options for patients' skincare routines.
description: Product Description E45 Moisturising Lotion is a light daily dry skin moisturiser that is ideal for everyday use all over the body, to keep your skin feeling soft, supple and hydrated. This moisturiser from the skincare experts at E45 is perfume-free, dermatologically-tested and allergy-screened, so it is even suitable as a sensitive skin moisturiser. It is a light, easily-absorbed lotion which can be used on the body, face and hands to improve skin’s health by correcting and preventing dry skin and other skin problems. E45 Moisturising Lotion contains Medilan, a purified, hypoallergenic form of lanolin with high quality moisturising properties. It soothes, protects and cares for your skin. Ingredients Aqua, petrolatum, isopropyl palmitate, paraffinum liquidum, glyceryl stearate, ceteth-20, hypoallergenic anhydrous lanolin (medilanr), phenoxyethanol, methylparaben, hydroxyethylcellulose, carbomer, propylparaben, sodium hydroxide, BHT. Directions Suitable for the whole family, including babies. Use as often as required on hands, body and face, to help keep dry and sensitive skin soft, supple and moisturised. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with the eyes, rinse thoroughly with clean water. Keep out reach of children. Box Contains 1 x E45 Dermatological Moisturising Lotion 200 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Reckitt Benckiser Dansom Lane, Hull, HU8 7DS. UK - PO Box 4044, Slough, SL1 0NS. ROI - Citywest Business Campus, Dublin 24. See more
